question: Does feature scaling improve logistic regression accuracy on breast_cancer? auto-research method safeguards
queries: ti:"AI Scientist" OR abs:"autonomous scientific discovery"

papers.title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
papers.abstract: A multi-agent research assistant workflow covering literature review, experiments, and report writing.

papers.title: AI Scientists Fail Without Strong Implementation Capability
papers.abstract: Argues that autonomous scientist systems can fail when implementation quality, experimental validity, and claim discipline are weak.

papers.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
papers.abstract: Frames language world models as predictors of environment dynamics from state and action. Lucky Loop applies this idea to experiment outcomes.

papers.title: AI Research Agents for Machine Learning: Search, Exploration, and Generalization in MLE-bench
papers.abstract: Studies search and exploration behavior of AI research agents for machine learning tasks.

papers.title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
papers.abstract: An autonomous scientific discovery system that generates ideas, writes code, runs experiments, and drafts papers. Useful as a baseline for end-to-end AI scientist workflows.

papers.title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
papers.abstract: A benchmark for ML engineering agents where agents search over real machine learning experiment spaces and are evaluated by task performance.

gap_findings.claim: Autonomous research agents can automate idea-to-report workflows, but final reports still need explicit claim calibration.
gap_findings.implication: Lucky Loop must separate observations from claims and force report claims through a verifier.
gap_findings.experiment: Compare classic_autoresearch against lucky_loop_full claim ledger outcomes.

gap_findings.claim: ML-agent benchmarks and search policies emphasize final performance more than prospective prediction before compute.
gap_findings.implication: Lucky Loop should log state, candidate action, predicted observation, real observation, and comparison.
gap_findings.experiment: Measure Qwen-AgentWorld prediction-vs-reality for every Lucky Loop candidate decision.

gap_findings.claim: Single-run leaderboard wins can overstate robustness when top models are close across seeds.
gap_findings.implication: A robust best-model claim requires matched multi-seed top-model verification.
gap_findings.experiment: Detect top observed models, rerun matched seeds, and compare effect size against seed noise.

gap_findings.claim: End-to-end autoresearch needs literature context, execution, analysis, and report generation tied to auditable evidence.
gap_findings.implication: The workspace must preserve sources, experiment plans, commands, traces, claim ledgers, and final report links.
gap_findings.experiment: Generate reports/autoresearch/<slug>/ with sources.json, research_context.json, experiment_plan.json, and evidence_manifest.json.

recommended_experiment_plan: Use Qwen-AgentWorld predictions before expensive actions.
Run generated code only after validation and dry-run.
Gate final claims through deterministic verification.
